task_completion.description: Configure 'Case of 24' Unit of Measure with a ratio of 24
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Units of Measure configuration screen showing a UoM named 'Case of 24' with a ratio indicating it is 24 times bigger than the reference unit (Units).

task_completion.description: Create a storable product named 'Glacier Spring Water 500ml'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Product form showing the product name 'Glacier Spring Water 500ml' and the Product Type set to 'Storable Product'.

task_completion.description: Set primary UoM to 'Units' and Purchase UoM to 'Case of 24'
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Glacier Spring Water 500ml' product form, the 'Unit of Measure' field is set to 'Units' and the 'Purchase UoM' field is set to 'Case of 24'.

task_completion.description: Create a purchase order for 5 Cases from 'AquaPure Supplies'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Purchase Order form showing vendor 'AquaPure Supplies', containing an order line for 'Glacier Spring Water 500ml' with a quantity of 5 and UoM of 'Case of 24'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the purchase order and receive the products
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Purchase Order status is 'Purchase Order' (confirmed) and the linked Receipt/Transfer shows a 'Done' status for the 5 cases.

task_completion.description: Verify the final inventory stock conversion equals 120 units
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'On Hand' smart button on the product form, or the Inventory Valuation/Stock report, shows exactly 120 Units for 'Glacier Spring Water 500ml'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows executing Python scripts, curl commands, or API calls to configure Odoo.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a natural progression of navigating through Odoo menus (Inventory, Purchase, Settings) rather than just a final text summary or manipulated HTML.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly manipulate the database
integrity.visual_evidence: No use of pgAdmin, psql, or terminal commands to directly insert records into the PostgreSQL database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Vendor Name: 'AquaPure Supplies'. Product Name: 'Glacier Spring Water 500ml'. UoM Name: 'Case of 24'. UoM Ratio: 24 (1 Case = 24 Units). PO Quantity: 5 Cases. Expected Final Inventory: 120 Units.
